heading: Provision of rewards
label: 7276e Provision of rewards
text: In carrying out a program under this section and , each Administrator referred to in is authorized to provide rewards (including cash rewards) to individuals who provide information or evidence leading to the arrest and prosecution of individuals causing damage to, or loss of, Federal property under their jurisdiction. The amount of any one such reward paid to any individual may not exceed a value of $1,000.section 7276d of this titlesection 7276d of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.
